title: US Stock Config Loader
summary_1line: Loads US Stock API Key and Secret from config file securely without exposing to outbox.
description: Infrastructure cell for ui_US Stock_stack_v1. Reads config_grace_apis.json, extracts the 'US Stock' block, and confirms presence of API Key/Secret. Does NOT output raw secrets.
purpose: Provides a secure, common initialization point for all US Stock market data cells.
